name: VRP com CPLEX
postCreateCommand: if [ -f ./.cplex/cplex_studio.linux_x86_64.bin ]; then chmod +x ./.cplex/cplex_studio.linux_x86_64.bin && sudo ./.cplex/cplex_studio.linux_x86_64.bin LAX_VM $(which java) -i silent; else echo 'Aviso: Instalador do CPLEX não encontrado na pasta cplex. Instalação ignorada.'; fi
